name: QuickBooks
description: QuickBooks Online Accounting API provides access to small business accounting data. Manage invoices, customers, payments, expenses, and financial reports programmatically.

capabilities.name: accounts_query
capabilities.description: Query the chart of accounts using SQL-like syntax. Filter by account type, name, or classification.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific account by its ID from the chart of accounts.

capabilities.name: accounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new account in the chart of accounts with type, name, and classification.

capabilities.name: accounts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing account. Requires full object with SyncToken for concurrency.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice for a customer with line items, tax, and due date.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific invoice by its ID with all line items and payment details.

capabilities.name: invoices_query
capabilities.description: Query invoices using SQL-like syntax. Filter by customer, date range, balance, and status.

capabilities.name: invoices_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing invoice. Requires full object with SyncToken.

capabilities.name: invoices_delete
capabilities.description: Delete (void) an invoice by ID and SyncToken.

capabilities.name: invoices_send
capabilities.description: Send an existing invoice to the customer via email.

capabilities.name: invoices_get_pdf
capabilities.description: Download the PDF version of an invoice.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record with contact info, billing address, and payment terms.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer by ID with full contact and billing details.

capabilities.name: customers_query
capabilities.description: Query customers using SQL-like syntax. Filter by name, email, or active status.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing customer record. Requires SyncToken for concurrency.

capabilities.name: payments_create
capabilities.description: Record a payment received from a customer. Link to invoices to mark them paid.

capabilities.name: payments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific payment by its ID.

capabilities.name: payments_query
capabilities.description: Query payments using SQL-like syntax. Filter by customer, date, or amount.

capabilities.name: payments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a payment by ID and SyncToken.

capabilities.name: items_create
capabilities.description: Create a new item (product or service) for use on invoices and sales receipts.

capabilities.name: items_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific item by its ID.

capabilities.name: items_query
capabilities.description: Query items using SQL-like syntax. Filter by name, type, or active status.

capabilities.name: items_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing item. Requires SyncToken for concurrency.

capabilities.name: purchases_create
capabilities.description: Record a business expense or purchase categorized by account and vendor.

capabilities.name: purchases_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific purchase (expense) by its ID.

capabilities.name: purchases_query
capabilities.description: Query purchases using SQL-like syntax. Filter by date, amount, or payment type.

capabilities.name: bills_create
capabilities.description: Create a new bill (accounts payable) from a vendor with line items and due date.

capabilities.name: bills_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific bill by its ID.

capabilities.name: bills_query
capabilities.description: Query bills using SQL-like syntax. Filter by vendor, date, or balance.

capabilities.name: billpayments_create
capabilities.description: Record a payment made to a vendor against one or more bills.

capabilities.name: vendors_create
capabilities.description: Create a new vendor record with contact and payment information.

capabilities.name: vendors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific vendor by ID.

capabilities.name: vendors_query
capabilities.description: Query vendors using SQL-like syntax. Filter by name, balance, or active status.

capabilities.name: vendors_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing vendor record. Requires SyncToken.

capabilities.name: estimates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new estimate (quote) for a customer with line items.

capabilities.name: estimates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific estimate by its ID.

capabilities.name: estimates_query
capabilities.description: Query estimates using SQL-like syntax. Filter by customer, date, or status.

capabilities.name: employees_create
capabilities.description: Create a new employee record with personal and contact information.

capabilities.name: employees_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific employee by ID.

capabilities.name: employees_query
capabilities.description: Query employees using SQL-like syntax.

capabilities.name: salesreceipts_create
capabilities.description: Create a sales receipt for an immediate payment without an invoice.

capabilities.name: salesreceipts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific sales receipt by its ID.

capabilities.name: creditmemos_create
capabilities.description: Create a credit memo to refund or credit a customer.

capabilities.name: creditmemos_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific credit memo by its ID.

capabilities.name: journalentries_create
capabilities.description: Create a journal entry with debit and credit lines for manual adjustments.

capabilities.name: journalentries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific journal entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: transfers_create
capabilities.description: Create a funds transfer between two bank accounts.

capabilities.name: deposits_create
capabilities.description: Record a bank deposit for undeposited funds or direct deposits.

capabilities.name: companyinfo_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the company profile including name, address, and fiscal year settings.

capabilities.name: reports_profit_and_loss
capabilities.description: Generate a Profit and Loss (income statement) report for a date range.

capabilities.name: reports_balance_sheet
capabilities.description: Generate a Balance Sheet report showing assets, liabilities, and equity.

capabilities.name: reports_cashflow
capabilities.description: Generate a Cash Flow statement report for a date range.

capabilities.name: reports_trial_balance
capabilities.description: Generate a Trial Balance report showing all account balances.

capabilities.name: taxcodes_query
capabilities.description: Query tax codes configured for the company.

capabilities.name: preferences_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the company preferences and feature settings.

capabilities.name: refundreceipts_create
capabilities.description: Create a refund receipt to record a refund to a customer.

capabilities.name: refundreceipts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific refund receipt by its ID.

capabilities.name: purchaseorders_create
capabilities.description: Create a purchase order to a vendor for goods or services.

capabilities.name: purchaseorders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific purchase order by its ID.

capabilities.name: timeactivities_create
capabilities.description: Record a time activity for billable time tracking.

capabilities.name: timeactivities_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific time activity by its ID.

capabilities.name: vendorcredits_create
capabilities.description: Create a vendor credit to record a credit from a vendor.

capabilities.name: vendorcredits_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific vendor credit by its ID.
